boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Government procurement / grants controls action now? Action: subrecipient payment before milestone acceptance. Boundary: invoice memo cannot release payment without accepted milestone.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Milestone acceptance and active status remain current and unresolved

critical_features_preserved: milestone acceptance and subrecipient active status both current
final_answer: Execution may not proceed. The controlling control record does not close the required dependency, and the communication boundary explicitly says invoice memo cannot release payment without accepted milestone. Because milestone acceptance and subrecipient status are still unresolved, the correct disposition is ESCALATE, not ALLOW.
